title: Better With StepItUp
description: Smoothly step up blocks but in BTA.
body:
# Port of [StepItUp](https://modrinth.com/mod/stepitup/version/2.0.1-1.20.1) to Better than Adventure 

> Smoothly move up blocks no spacebar needed!

> Additonal configuration available in StepItUp category in game settings.

<sub>This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page. </sub>

Requires Halplibe.

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cr1yM0XA/images/7296f8e353eb6ae5336b891f3609a37a6859e9b3.gif)
